Question: Backend used
Answer: Next.js backend (App Router) using API routes under `app/api/*` and a Next.js middleware (`src/middleware.ts`) for route protection/auth redirects. Server is started via `node app.js` (which spawns `next start`).
Evidence (project files): package.json; app.js; src/middleware.ts; app/api/* route handlers; src/lib/api/handler.ts

Question: Frontend used
Answer: Next.js + React 18 App Router UI. Uses Tailwind CSS (and also MUI components in dependencies) for the admin/vendor/customer UI.
Evidence (project files): package.json (next, react, tailwind, @mui/*); components/pages in src/app/pages/*

Question: Database used
Answer: Prisma ORM with MySQL database (`datasource db { provider = mysql }`).

Question: Messaging tool (SMA + Email)
Answer: Email: implemented via `nodemailer` + SMTP. Uses env-driven transport config (`SMTP_HOST`, `SMTP_PORT`, `SMTP_USER`, `SMTP_PASS`, optional `SMTP_FROM`) and sends via `transport.sendMail(...)`. Email link base URL is built from `APP_URL`/`PORT` in `emailConfig.appUrl`. SMS/SMA: not found in the repository (no Twilio/WhatsApp/SMS integration code detected).
Evidence (project files): src/lib/email/send.ts; src/lib/email/config.ts; src/lib/email/vendor-verification.ts; src/lib/email/vendor-password-reset.ts; README.md; .env.example; properties.env

Question: Security measures used
Answer: Auth: JWT stored in an HTTP-only cookie (cookie name default `auth_token`) with `sameSite: lax`, `path: /`, and `maxAge`; production `secure` flag is controlled via `COOKIE_SECURE` and HTTPS detection. JWT signing/verification uses `jose` with HS256. Passwords: bcrypt hashing + verification (salt rounds=12). Authorization/route protection: `src/middleware.ts` validates JWT from cookies (`getVerifiedSession`), enforces role-based access (ADMIN/SELLER/CUSTOMER), and redirects unauthorized users to login with `callbackUrl`; API routes enforce authorization using `getSession`/`requireSession` which throws `ApiRouteError` with 401 'Not authenticated'.
Evidence (project files): src/lib/auth/cookies.ts; src/lib/auth/config.ts; src/lib/auth/jwt.ts; src/lib/auth/password.ts; src/lib/auth/session.ts; src/middleware.ts; src/lib/auth/middleware-routes.ts; app/api/*
